# The Dale Ledger

> An unofficial Scarsdale, New York property almanac: searchable assessment rolls (2026, 2025, 2024), estimated property taxes, elementary school zones, building permits, planning-board news, and editorial Honor Roll superlatives. Residential parcels only. SWIS 555000. Not affiliated with the Village of Scarsdale.

The Dale Ledger helps residents, researchers, buyers, and journalists answer questions about who owns what in Scarsdale, what the Assessor values it at, estimated annual property tax, which elementary school zone a street maps to, and what permits or board items are on file.

Official figures: confirm on [PROS](https://townofscarsdale.prosgar.com/) and published rolls at [scarsdale.gov Assessment Rolls](https://www.scarsdale.gov/833/Assessment-Rolls).

## Main app

- [Home / Property search](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/): Smart lookup by address, owner name, parcel ID, school zone, value band, or tax range. Example queries: `heathcote over 3m`, `tax over 80k`, `palmer ave`, `biggest tax`.
- [Honor Roll](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/?panel=honor): Editorial superlatives — highest assessed, biggest tax bill, largest lot, street dynasties, year-over-year movers.
- [Browse the roll](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/?panel=browse): Slice ~5,500 residential parcels by elementary zone, full-market value band, street, or property type.
- [Permits](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/?panel=permits): Building, plumbing, pool, and street permits from village PROS records.
- [Board news](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/?panel=news): Planning Board, BAR, ZBA, Historic Preservation agendas plus recent permit activity.

## Data files (JSON, public record derivatives)

- [2026 roll](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/data/2026.json): Tentative assessment roll parcels and assessed values.
- [2025 roll](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/data/2025.json): Final assessment roll.
- [2024 roll](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/data/2024.json): Tentative assessment roll.
- [School zone map](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/data/schools.json): Street-to-elementary-zone mapping (Edgewood, Fox Meadow, Greenacres, Heathcote, Quaker Ridge).
- [Tax rate reference](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/data/tax_rates.json): County, village, and school mill rates for estimates.
- [Permits index](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/data/permits.json): PROS permit scrape by parcel.
- [Board news feed](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/data/news.json): Agenda center and permit headlines.

## Full agent documentation

- [llms-full.txt](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/llms-full.txt): Complete capability guide, query grammar, disclaimers, and citation guidance for AI systems.

## Topics this site answers

Scarsdale property tax estimate, Scarsdale assessment roll lookup, Scarsdale home values, Scarsdale school zones, Heathcote elementary zone, Edgewood elementary zone, Fox Meadow elementary zone, Greenacres elementary zone, Quaker Ridge elementary zone, Scarsdale building permits, Scarsdale planning board, Westchester County property records, SWIS 555000, PROS Scarsdale parcel lookup.

## Optional

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/jrten12/dalere): Source, extract scripts, and data pipeline.
- [Sitemap](https://jrten12.github.io/dalere/sitemap.xml): URL index for crawlers.
